# Cayton & Associates, LLP - CPAs Serving Greenville & Eastern NC
Whether you’re a business owner looking for a partner in managing the accounting needs for your company or you’re an individual preparing your taxes or planning your estate, Cayton & Associates, LLP have the expertise to serve your needs. The partners of the firm have more than 100 years of collective experience and offer a broad range of financial services to individuals and businesses. The small size of our firm allows us to provide our clients with timely responses to questions and a higher level of personal service over that of larger firms. All of our professionals are members of the American Institute of Certified Public Accountants (AICPA) and the Coastal Plains Chapter of the North Carolina Association of Certified Public Accountants (NCACPA). We’re proud members of Greenville and the Eastern North Carolina community, and we believe that personal service and attention are the qualities that you deserve in a CPA firm that truly understands your needs.
[ Partner With Us ](https://cawg.net/contact)

We’re excited to announce that **Cayton & Associates, LLP ****has joined Carr, Riggs & Ingram (CRI), **a nationally recognized accounting and advisory firm. Our office will now operate under the Carr, Riggs & Ingram name.

##  What is foundersbase?
Foundersbase is a networking platform where startup founders connect with co-founders, entrepreneurial talent, and early supporters to build their ventures.   
  
Members from all over the world create profiles, showcase their startup projects, and engage in direct conversations to form a founding team, find advisors and investors, or recruit startup hires.   
  
Unlike broad networking sites, Foundersbase is specifically designed for founder's needs and uses advanced profile curation technology to ensure that every connection is relevant - whether you're looking for a tech co-founder, a marketing expert, or someone to invest early support in your idea.
[ Join us today! ](https://us.foundersbase.com/signup)
https://www.founderio.com/feed
